title: Add partners section and openable sidebar navigation

requirements.summary: Add a 'Partners' section on the home page displaying FreshGuard's partnerships with Frigidaire, Whirlpool, and KitchenAid
acceptanceCriteria: A 'Partners' or 'Our Partners' section is visible on the home/landing page
Frigidaire, Whirlpool, and KitchenAid are each displayed as partner brands
The section matches the FreshGuard visual theme and does not appear out of place
Section is responsive and looks correct on mobile and desktop

file_operations.description: Create a new Partners component that displays the three partner brands (Frigidaire, Whirlpool, KitchenAid) with their logos from frontend/public/assets/generated/frigidaire-logo.dim_200x80.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/whirlpool-logo.dim_200x80.png, and frontend/public/assets/generated/kitchenaid-logo.dim_200x80.png. Use a grid layout with scroll animations consistent with other sections. Style the section heading and partner cards to match the FreshGuard brand theme defined in frontend/src/index.css and frontend/tailwind.config.js.

Import the new Partners component and insert it into the home page render between the FeaturesShowcase and HowItWorks sections to create a logical flow. Ensure it only renders when currentPage is 'home'.

requirements.summary: Implement an openable/closeable sidebar navigation drawer with menu links to all major sections
acceptanceCriteria: A menu/hamburger button is always visible on the page regardless of which section is active
Clicking the button opens a sidebar drawer with navigation links
Sidebar contains links: Business Plan, How It Works, Financials, The Pitch, Sharks Vote
Clicking any sidebar link navigates to or scrolls to the corresponding section/page
Clicking a link or an outside area closes the sidebar
Sidebar is styled consistently with the FreshGuard brand and matches the clean, minimal style shown in the screenshot
Sidebar works correctly on both mobile and desktop screen sizes

file_operations.description: Create a Sidebar component that renders a slide-in drawer from the left side with navigation links for: Business Plan, How It Works, Financials, The Pitch, and Sharks Vote. Implement open/close state management. Each link should either scroll to the corresponding section on the home page (Business Plan maps to CompanyInfo, How It Works maps to HowItWorks, Financials maps to SharkTankFinancials, The Pitch maps to Hero) or navigate to the respective page using the setCurrentPage callback (Sharks Vote navigates to 'vote' page). Include click-outside-to-close and escape-key-to-close behaviors. Style the sidebar with a white background, clean typography matching the screenshot, smooth slide-in/out transitions, and an overlay backdrop. Ensure the sidebar z-index is high enough to appear above all page content.

Create a MenuButton component that renders a fixed-position hamburger menu icon button. The button should be visible on all pages in the top-left or top-right corner with appropriate z-index. When clicked, it triggers the sidebar to open. Style the button consistently with the FreshGuard brand using colors from the theme. Ensure the button is accessible and works on both mobile and desktop.

Import and render both the MenuButton and Sidebar components at the top level of the App component so they persist across all pages ('home', 'store', 'vote'). Add state management for sidebar open/close that is passed to both components. Wire the navigation callbacks so that sidebar link clicks can both change currentPage state and trigger smooth scrolling to sections when on the home page.
